'''鈭歞h-p-k''' ('''dhapaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excise|excise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excise|excise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-p-k
|-
! Lemma
| dhapaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapakithi|dhapakithi]] || [[word:dhapakiji|dhapakiji]] || [[word:dhapakishi|dhapakishi]] || [[word:dhapaki|dhapaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapakuthuth|dhapakuthuth]] || [[word:dhapakujuj|dhapakujuj]] || [[word:dhapakushush|dhapakushush]] || [[word:dhapak|dhapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapakuthu|dhapakuthu]] || [[word:dhapakuju|dhapakuju]] || [[word:dhapakushu|dhapakushu]] || [[word:dhapaku|dhapaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapakufuth|dhapakufuth]] || [[word:dhapakufuj|dhapakufuj]] || [[word:dhapakufush|dhapakufush]] || [[word:dhapakuf|dhapakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapakethe|dhapakethe]] || [[word:dhapakeje|dhapakeje]] || [[word:dhapakeshe|dhapakeshe]] || [[word:dhapake|dhapake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapakothoth|dhapakothoth]] || [[word:dhapakojoj|dhapakojoj]] || [[word:dhapakoshosh|dhapakoshosh]] || [[word:dhapak|dhapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapakotho|dhapakotho]] || [[word:dhapakojo|dhapakojo]] || [[word:dhapakosho|dhapakosho]] || [[word:dhapako|dhapako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapakofoth|dhapakofoth]] || [[word:dhapakofoj|dhapakofoj]] || [[word:dhapakofosh|dhapakofosh]] || [[word:dhapakof|dhapakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapak忙th忙|dhapak忙th忙]] || [[word:dhapak忙j忙|dhapak忙j忙]] || [[word:dhapak忙sh忙|dhapak忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhapak忙|dhapak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapakathath|dhapakathath]] || [[word:dhapakajaj|dhapakajaj]] || [[word:dhapakashash|dhapakashash]] || [[word:dhapak|dhapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapakatha|dhapakatha]] || [[word:dhapakaja|dhapakaja]] || [[word:dhapakasha|dhapakasha]] || [[word:dhapaka|dhapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapakafath|dhapakafath]] || [[word:dhapakafaj|dhapakafaj]] || [[word:dhapakafash|dhapakafash]] || [[word:dhapakaf|dhapakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhapakasha|dhapakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhapakasha|godhapakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhapakasha|gokidhapakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhapakn眉sha|dhapakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhapaknkn眉sha|godhapaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapakn眉sha|gokidhapakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhapaksh毛sha|dhapaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhapaknksh毛sha|godhapaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhapaksh毛sha|gokidhapaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapakrosha|dhapakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapaknkrosha|godhapaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapakrosha|gokidhapakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapakmusha|dhapakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapaknkmusha|godhapaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapakmusha|gokidhapakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhapaksherasha|dhapaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhapaknksherasha|godhapaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhapaksherasha|gokidhapaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhapakngasha|dhapakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhapaknkngasha|godhapaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhapakngasha|gokidhapakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhapakyasha|dhapakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhapaknkyasha|godhapaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhapakyasha|gokidhapakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhapakyamasha|dhapakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhapaknkyamasha|godhapaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhapakyamasha|gokidhapakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhapakn眉sh毛sha|dhapakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhapaknkn眉sh毛sha|godhapaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhapakn眉sh毛sha|gokidhapakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapakn眉rosha|dhapakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapaknkn眉rosha|godhapaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapakn眉rosha|gokidhapakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapakn眉musha|dhapakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapaknkn眉musha|godhapaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapakn眉musha|gokidhapakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhapaksh毛n眉sha|dhapaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhapaknksh毛n眉sha|godhapaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapaksh毛n眉sha|gokidhapaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapaksh毛rosha|dhapaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapaknksh毛rosha|godhapaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapaksh毛rosha|gokidhapaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapaksh毛musha|dhapaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapaknksh毛musha|godhapaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapaksh毛musha|gokidhapaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhapakron眉sha|dhapakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhapaknkron眉sha|godhapaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapakron眉sha|gokidhapakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhapakrosh毛sha|dhapakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhapaknkrosh毛sha|godhapaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhapakrosh毛sha|gokidhapakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhapakromusha|dhapakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhapaknkromusha|godhapaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhapakromusha|gokidhapakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhapakmun眉sha|dhapakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhapaknkmun眉sha|godhapaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhapakmun眉sha|gokidhapakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhapakmush毛sha|dhapakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhapaknkmush毛sha|godhapaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhapakmush毛sha|gokidhapakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhapakmurosha|dhapakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhapaknkmurosha|godhapaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhapakmurosha|gokidhapakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhapak|dhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙p忙k|dh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhapak|hodhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙p忙k|hodh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhapak|hohodhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙p忙k|hohodh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhapak|n眉dhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙p忙k|n眉dh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhapak|n眉n眉dhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙p忙k|n眉n眉dh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhapak|n茂dhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙p忙k|n茂dh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhapak|n茂n茂dhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙p忙k|n茂n茂dh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhapak|ludhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙p忙k|ludh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhapak|luludhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙p忙k|luludh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhapak|lidhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙p忙k|lidh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhapak|lilidhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙p忙k|lilidh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhapak|kodhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙p忙k|kodh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhapak|kokodhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙p忙k|kokodh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhapak|kedhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙p忙k|kedh忙p忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhapak|kekedhapak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙p忙k|kekedh忙p忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
